description:
This problem was generated by GoTools and published on the Tsumego of the day page, on Dec 29, 2003. (It's the easier problem)

(A little note - Wouldn't it be great if we could always c these problems here? I tried contacting the author, but the email as well as the main page, seem to have expired..)
